name: Marble Run 3D
author: Poki
description: Marble Run 3D is a racing game where you choose your country’s marble and compete against others in a thrilling race to the finish line. Smash rival marbles off the track, navigate obstacles, and pave your path to victory. Prefer to sharpen your skills first? Switch to challenge mode and practice to perfection. Can you outpace the competition and claim first place? How to play Marble Run 3D? Use A/D or the left/right arrow keys to move the marble, or move your cursor or finger on the screen! Who created Marble Run 3D? Marble Run 3D is created by OSA Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Smash It and Zombroad ! How can I play Marble Run 3D for free? You can play Marble Run 3D for free on Poki. Can I play Marble Run 3D on mobile devices and desktop? Marble Run 3D can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
